name: 20W Led Mini Wall Pack – 5700K With Photocell
description: ZION LED USA Mini Led Wall pack are specially manufactured for entrance lighting and outdoor lighting, 20W Mini Led Wall Pack Lighting series can be widely used in hotel building, courtyards, entrance lighting, warehouse lighting and many more areas. Also these wall-packs are water resistance. The lumen output of this light is 2850 with long lifespan, and high energy efficiency. Housing is made of aluminum alloy for excellent heat dissipation. The product has an internal IP65 driver making it dust and moisture resistant so as to be conveniently installed in locations with harsh weather conditions. An aesthetically designed luminaire, this led does have a mounting option. UL and DLC certified.
short_desc: Key Features: Watts: 20W Kelvins: 5700K Lumens Efficacy: 135 LM/Watt Lumens: 2850 Lumens Viewing Angle: 100 degree Input Voltage: 100-277VAC Operating Frequency: 50/60Hz Base/Mount Type: Wall Mount Driver Model: China Brand Driver Led Qty: 60 Pcs Certification: UL/ DLC Operating Temperature: -4 F TO 113 F Weight: 1.9 LBS Power Factor: ≥0.9 IP Rating: Wet(IP65) LED Type: SMD2835（0.5W） Dimensions: 8.58″ x 5.78″ x 3.07″ CRI: >80 Housing Material: Aluminum Housing Color: Brown Led Type: 2835(0.5W) Photocell: Yes Warranty: 5 Years
